heroLine: Every version of life is better with you in it.
letter: Happy birthday, my love. I wanted to make you something that could hold more than a card ever could.
This is our little museum: the loud moments, the quiet ones, and all the ordinary days that became special because they were with you.

memories.title: Where our story started
memories.caption: Write what you remember about this moment, including the tiny details only the two of you know.

memories.title: The day we could not stop laughing
memories.caption: A short, specific story will feel much more personal than a general caption.

memories.title: Still my favourite person
memories.caption: End the timeline with something recent and a thought about where you are together today.

reasons: You make ordinary days feel like an adventure.
You understand the things I do not always know how to say.
Your laugh can change the mood of an entire room.
You make me want to become a better version of myself.
You are the person I want to tell everything to.
Being with you feels like home.
future: Take the trip we keep talking about
Make a hundred more ordinary days special
finalTitle: My favourite memory is still the one we have not made yet.
finalMessage: Happy birthday. I love you, and I cannot wait for everything that comes next.
